rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 12, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF DEBORAH CHATMAN'S Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure continued to August 21, 2019 on Court's own motion. If parties agree on a different date for a hearing (after August 21, 2019), parties may jointly notify the Court to avoid an appearance solely for the purpose of contesting the new hearing date. The notification may be provided to department 501 at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org no later than 8:00 a.m. on August 12, 2019. = (501/CFH)

PLAINTIFF SRG PACIFIC MGMT LLC DBA COVENTRY PLACE's Motion For Attorneys' Fees continued to September 3, 2019. Moving party to submit time records for each time keeper no later than August 16, 2019. If parties agree on a different date for a hearing (after September 3, 2019), parties may jointly notify the Court to avoid an appearance solely for the purpose of contesting the new hearing date.
